name: Samuel Cushman
school: School of Informatics, Computing, and Cyber Systems
bio: Samuel Cushman is a research scientist whose work focuses on landscape ecology, spatial analysis, remote sensing, biodiversity, and conservation modeling. He has held research roles with Northern Arizona University, the U.S. Forest Service, and the University of Oxford, and his work connects geospatial science with practical applications in habitat modeling, connectivity, and natural resource management.
